name: restaurant general managers managing 5-15 employees tool
description: For restaurant general managers managing 5-15 employees, inaccurate labor cost reporting causes budget overruns. We automate weekly labor cost reports instead of manual labor cost calculations using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate labor cost reporting leading to budget overruns.
features: manual data entry for employee hours
